creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Paul, thank you for offering to maintain a FreeBSD port.

Can you attach a patch to update the MAINTAINER line in the port here please?

While the change to the MAINTAINER line to do this is trivial (and we can do it on your behalf), getting oneself ready to maintainer a port, including preparing a development/testing environment and its tools, being comfortable and confident  producing patches and being familiar with the change submitting process (here in Bugzilla) is a good and recommended set of first steps.

If this port also needs updates to bring it into the latest ports framework best practices, version updates or otherwise, it would be good to bundle the maintainer change with those.

For more info, see:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/makefile-maintainer.html and
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing/ports-contributing.html#maintain-port

Don't hesitate to ping us here or on #freebsd-ports on freenode IRC if you have any questions or need help
